results.title: Slack AI Agents with Agentforce & Agentic AI | Slack
results.content:
## Agents empower every employee, in every role.

HR AgentSupport employees during onboarding, help with benefits enquiries and provide guidance on career development questions

IT AgentAddress issues as they arise, like resolving help-desk tickets and running incident communications

Service Agent Identify experts and surface historical knowledge to solve customer issues

Sales AgentPrepare executive briefings, create proposals and proactively reach out to customers

Marketing AgentWork with agents to optimise campaigns, generate content, create plans, and more

Legal AgentSimplify and automate compliance processes and approvals with agents

Product and Engineering AgentBring more agility to teams as agents help plan, design, develop and ensure quality [...] Supply Chain Management AgentManage suppliers, automate warehouse operations, enhance demand forecasting, and more

## Agents empower every employee, in every role.

HR AgentSupport employees during onboarding, help with benefits enquiries and provide guidance on career development questions

IT AgentAddress issues as they arise, like resolving help-desk tickets and running incident communications

Service Agent Identify experts and surface historical knowledge to solve customer issues

Sales AgentPrepare executive briefings, create proposals and proactively reach out to customers

Marketing AgentWork with agents to optimise campaigns, generate content, create plans, and more

Legal AgentSimplify and automate compliance processes and approvals with agents [...] Watch now

## Frequently asked questions

An AI agent is an intelligent system that can handle customer questions all on its own, no humans needed. It uses machine learning and natural language processing to tackle everything from easy questions to tricky problems, and it can even juggle multiple tasks at once. AI agents can learn and get better over time, which is different from traditional AI that needs humans to step in for certain tasks. AI agents can take action on behalf of employees.

results.title: AI agents are starting to expose how broken most workflows already ...
results.content:
### Underrated and niche uses

   Monitoring local policy or niche sites and auto-summarizing changes."using agents to monitor local government websites for policy updates and then auto-summarize the changes into Slack."

   Automated data cleaning and enrichment for sales or research."automated data cleaning and enrichment ... validates emails, checks LinkedIn profiles, and even tags industries"

   Agents that run long-running monitoring (price, market, or API cost anomalies). "monitoring agent ... sends Telegram pings ... an agent that monitors API costs across providers and flags anomalies." [...] # AI agents are starting to expose how broken most workflows already were : r/AI_Agents
Skip to main contentAI agents are starting to expose how broken most workflows already were : r/AI_Agents

Open menu Open navigation"

   Agents turn notes, PDFs and emails into a searchable personal “brain.”"Turning my PDFs, notes, and emails into one searchable brain using elephas app."

### Home and personal life assistants

   Meal-planning and grocery list agents adapt to diet and auto-build shopping lists."Meal planning + grocery agents that sync with dietary needs and auto-generate shopping lists"

   Personal trainer agents schedule workouts and track lifts."I built a personal trainer agent that sends me workouts depending on the day. Also has memory so it doesn't repeat the same workout" [...]

results.title: It’s Sunday on Slack. No One Told Our AI Agents They Didn’t Have to Check In. | SaaStrAI
results.content:
## Get Off The Fence

If you’re running a B2B company and you haven’t deployed at least a few AI agents into your daily operations yet, you’re leaving reliability on the table. Not just efficiency. Reliability.

Start with the boring stuff. The daily report that someone always forgets. The lead follow-up that slips through cracks on Fridays. The sponsor check-in that gets deprioritized during crunch time.

Give that to an agent. Watch it never miss a beat. Then give it more.

It’s Sunday. My AI agents already checked in. Did yours?

### Related Posts

 New!! Check Out SaaStr's AI Agent Guide. The 20+ AI Agents We Use.
 Dear SaaStr: Should I Run 20+ AI Agents the Way SaaStr Does?
 Dear SaaStr: What's a Big Check for a VC Investor?

Jason Lemkin

Jason Lemkin

Founder SaaStr [...] Our AI-powered 10K Daily Bot had already pulled together our full daily dashboard for SaaStr Annual 2026: total attendees, sponsor count, ticket revenue, paid vs. free ticket mix, year-over-year comps against 2025, ASP trends, the works. Every metric I need, formatted and ready, sitting in the channel before I even opened my eyes.
 And right below it, our Sponsor Portal bot had already filed its daily report. 100+ sponsors tracked. Overall completion rates. At-risk sponsors flagged. Activity from the last 24 hours broken out by company and contact. One sponsor that hasn’t started their tasks yet, called out by name with a warning emoji.

Nobody asked them to do this “over the weekend”. Nobody reminded them.

They just… showed up. Like they do every single day. [...] SaaStrAI SaaStrAI

Select Page

# It’s Sunday on Slack. No One Told Our AI Agents They Didn’t Have to Check In.

by Jason Lemkin | Artificial Intelligence (AI), Blog Posts, SaaStr.Ai

I woke up Sunday morning morning, grabbed my coffee, and opened Slack. No one’s working.

Except … well that’s not quite right anymore.

Two highly detailed reports were already waiting for me. Posted at midnight and 9:00 AM, respectively.
